creator: ag-freebsd@muc.de
text:
revious patchset does some hacks which generate compiler warnings on FreeBSD/amd64 platforms which are treated as errors when compiling kernel modules
(-Werror).

Updated patchset updates unit device handling, as FreeBSD 8 changed device_t.

Successful compilation has been both verified on FreeBSD-7 and FreeBSD-8.

Fix: 

See the updated port at 

http://www.muc.de/~ag/pvrxxx-20080409-port.tgz

The patch sets have been split into seperate patch files per file for easier maintainability.
How-To-Repeat: On a FreeBSD 8.* or FreeBSD 7.*/amd64 platform:

cd /usr/ports/multimedia/pvrxxx && make
